data.current_summary: Get blocklist or allowlist param feed status
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves the current status and configuration of a blocklist or allowlist parameter-based feed. Use this operation to verify feed configuration and monitor feed health.

data.current_summary: Add an entry to a blocklist/allowlist feed
data.description_suggestion: Creates or adds an entry to a blocklist or allowlist parameter-based feed. Accepts a ParamServer request body containing the server entry to add. Requires feed type (blocklist/allowlist), content type, and feed name as path parameters. Returns HTTP 202 Accepted indicating the entry has been queued for processing. The feed will be updated asynchronously. Use this operation to dynamically add new entries to threat feeds without file uploads.
